common.specialDiscount: Bigger savings for a longer duration
common.calculatorTip2: 1. The price is an estimate and may differ from the final price.
common.calculatorTip3: 2. When resource usage is calculated using the pay-per-use billing mode, decimal numerals are rounded off and accurate to two decimal places. For example, if the estimated price is less than $0.01 USD (after rounding off), $0.01 USD will be displayed.
common.detailTip1: 1. Standard pricing: The price is calculated based on the pricing basis, resource usage, and length or frequency of use. Prices are accurate to two decimal places.
common.detailTip2: 2. Tiered pricing: Pay less by using longer or more. Prices are accurate to two decimal places.
common.detailTip3: 3. When resource usage is calculated using the pay-per-use billing mode, decimal numerals are rounded off and accurate to two decimal places. For example, if the estimated price is less than $0.01 USD (after rounding off), $0.01 USD will be displayed.
common.goPriceTips1: Available soon in the Price Calculator. Go to
common.regionTip: The CN East-Shanghai2 region will be available only to existing customers from April 20, 2020. We recommend you select other regions.
common.RIChargeModeTip: Note:Reserved instance product only support category-based discounts, and do not support flavor-based discounts

cartlist.tips2: to add products to the Price List.

cartButton.httpErrorTip1: Please try again later or go to

tabContent.goPriceTips1: Available soon in the Price Calculator. Go to

shareLinkModal.title: Share List
shareLinkModal.content_1: The list can be accessed at the following link:

saveAndShareModal.title: Save and Share
saveAndShareModal.content_3: This field cannot be left blank.

unsavedShareListModal.title: Unsaved List
unsavedShareListModal.content_1: You have an unsaved list. If you leave this page, the content of the list cannot be recovered. Do you want to save the list?

timeoutModal.title: Session Timeout
timeoutModal.content_1: Your session has timed out. Please log in again.

unloginModal.title: Login
unloginModal.content_1: You are not logged in. Please log in and save the list.

shareLinkDeletedModal.title: List Not Found
shareLinkDeletedModal.content_1: This list may have been deleted by the creator.

deleteConfirmModal.title: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
deleteConfirmModal.content_1: _SHARELISTXXX_ list cannot be recovered after it is deleted and the link to it will become invalid.

unStationUserModal.title: Wrong Account
unStationUserModal.content_1: You are logged in as an International website user and cannot save a price list of the Chinese Mainland website. Please use your Chinese Mainland website account to log in.
unStationUserModal.content_2: You are logged in as a Chinese Mainland website user and cannot save a price list of the International website. Please use your International website account to log in.

menuUnSavedModal.content_1: You are going to change the price calculation mode. You have a list unsaved and its content will be lost after the change. Please save the list first

success.success_1: List saved successfully. You can share the list with others.

error.error_1: Failed to save the list because the maximum number of lists (50) has been reached. Delete lists that are not required and try again.
error.error_2: Failed to save the list due to a network error. Please try again or export the list to save it.
error.error_3: The system is busy. Please try again later.

poptip.title: My Lists
poptip.content_1: Save your lists and share them.
